goal: Home install banner CTA 'Get app' → 'Coming Soon' (app not live yet)
fix: index.html 'Get app' → 'Coming Soon'; th/index.html → 'เร็ว ๆ นี้'. Banner href stays '#'.

goal: Celtic 78-card deal/shuffle: faster + simpler + fix the buggy collect-to-centre
root_cause: Shuffle used animateCollectSlots (78 cards fly to board centre via per-card getBoundingClientRect → layout thrash/jank) then a long staggered deal. Also a first attempt at a staggered centre-out deal left cards stuck invisible after shuffle because it operated on a stale slots array while the on-screen nodes kept the collect's opacity:0.
fix: Added a 'full' animationProfile. Deal = animateFullDeal: all rows + both sides reveal together (opacity/scale, no translate), querying the LIVE boardEl.querySelectorAll('.card-slot') so it always reveals the on-screen nodes. Collect = animateSimpleCollect: in-place fade+shrink (no fly-to-centre). render()/performDeal branch to these for profile 'full'.
verified: chrome MCP localhost @430px: after shuffle 78/78 cards visible, board unlocks, 4-row layout intact, ~0.5s total (was buggy/blank before the live-query fix). node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.

goal: Logged-out tap on the board deck name → sign-in prompt ('get new decks') instead of the dead-end picker
fix: main.js wireDeckSwitcher: if !getCurrentUserSync(), open showSignInGate with deck-specific title/body instead of showDeckPicker (logged-out can only own the default deck). sign-in-gate.js: showSignInGate now accepts optional title/body overrides (in-app-browser guidance still wins). common.js: new deckGateTitle/deckGateBody (EN+TH).
verified: chrome MCP: logged-out deck tap → gate titled 'Sign in to get new decks', picker not shown. node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
